name: Goal Tree
description: Decompose a goal into the conditions, sub-goals, and actions required to achieve it
systemPromptHint: Each condition must pass both tests: necessity (remove it and the parent fails) and sufficiency (all siblings together guarantee the parent). State conditions as testable assertions, not aspirations — "Customer NPS above 50" not "Happy customers." Leaf actions must be concrete, assignable, and time-bound. If all conditions are met but the goal might still fail, the decomposition is wrong.

nodeTags.name: Goal
nodeTags.description: A target outcome or sub-goal that the tree is intended to achieve

nodeTags.name: Necessary Condition
nodeTags.description: A condition that must be satisfied to support a higher-level goal

nodeTags.name: Action
nodeTags.description: A concrete action or initiative that helps satisfy a condition or goal

derivedIndicators.name: Foundation
derivedIndicators.description: No incoming edges — a starting condition or action you can work on directly

derivedIndicators.name: Bridge
derivedIndicators.description: Has both incoming and outgoing edges — links concrete work to higher-level goals

derivedIndicators.name: Target Goal
derivedIndicators.description: No outgoing edges — a top-level goal or endpoint being pursued
